task_completion.description: Create the first graph for Hourly CPU Average
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graphite UI, there should be a graph titled 'Hourly CPU Average'. The target input field for this graph must exactly match: summarize(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, "1h", "avg")

task_completion.description: Create the second graph for Daily Temperature Peaks
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graphite UI, there should be a graph titled 'Daily Temperature Peaks'. The target input field for this graph must exactly match: smartSummarize(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature, "1d", "max")

task_completion.description: Create the third graph for 6-Hour Network Volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graphite UI, there should be a graph titled '6-Hour Network Volume'. The target input field for this graph must exactly match: summarize(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in, "6h", "sum")

task_completion.description: Ensure the dashboard contains exactly three graphs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dashboard view in Graphite should display exactly three graphs, corresponding to the CPU, Temperature, and Network metrics specified.

task_completion.description: Save the dashboard with the exact required name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard must be saved. The title at the top of the Graphite dashboard interface or in the URL/save dialog must exactly read 'Operations Review Buckets'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Graphite web GUI being interacted with, rather than terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the targets into the actual Graphite application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metric targets and titles should be visible inside the Graphite graph configuration panels or composer, not just written in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the output by typing the requirements into a text document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final result must be a rendered Graphite dashboard, not a text file, markdown file, or notes app containing the text from the prompt.
